scripts.dev:deps: cd infra/docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file ../../.env up -d
scripts.dev:deps:down: cd infra/docker && docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml down
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && sh -c 'if [ -x .venv/bin/uvicorn ]; then .venv/bin/uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000; else echo "Missing apps/api/.venv. Run: python3 -m venv .venv && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt"; exit 1; fi'
